name: 41_Stock_Classification_KNN_YahooFinance_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uainishaji wa hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa KNN kwenye seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance. Utekelezaji wako unapaswa kuamua ikiwa hisa fulani itaongezeka au kupungua bei. Anza kwa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kuchagua vipengele muhimu zaidi katika `src/data_loader.py`. Sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia kisanidi cha KNN kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa, na uhifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji katika `results/classification_results.txt`, na onyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji kama ramani ya joto kwa kutumia seaborn. Hifadhi ramani ya joto kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana chini ya `results/` ambayo inaelezea mchakato, inaonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji, na itasaidia kurahisisha masasisho ya baadaye yanayoanzisha data mpya.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Kisanidi cha KNN" kinatumika kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`.
Ramani ya joto inayoonyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`.
Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa chini ya `results/` ili kuelezea mchakato na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kujumuisha maelezo wazi ya kila hatua, ikiwa ni pamoja na uhandisi wa vipengele na tathmini ya mfano.
Ramani ya joto ya uhusiano inapaswa kuonyesha viashiria vya kiufundi muhimu zaidi na kutoa ufahamu juu ya uhusiano wao.
Mfumo unapaswa kuruhusu masasisho rahisi na data mpya, na kufanya notebook iwe rahisi kwa uchambuzi wa baadaye.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement Yahoo Finance data loading. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no actual use of libraries like `yfinance` or `pandas_datareader` to fetch real Yahoo Finance data, no actual data loading logic, and no data preparation code. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it was designed to appear compliant without actually fulfilling the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. It does not perform any actual feature engineering, technical indicator generation, or feature selection. The file only defines:

- A list of requirement criteria strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`)
- A `requirement_notes()` function that returns those strings
- A `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`
- A `build_transforms()` function returning a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`

There is no actual implementation of technical indicators (e.g., RSI, MACD, moving averages), no feature selection logic, and no real data processing. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no feature engineering was executed or recorded. This is clearly a minimal semantic placeholder, not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. There is no actual data standardization code present — no use of `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any other normalization/standardization logic. The file merely lists standardization as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and returns a dummy dictionary from `load_dataset()`. No real implementation of feature scaling or standardization exists in the codebase.

judge_stats.criteria: "Kisanidi cha KNN" kinatumika kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual KNN classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual KNN algorithm, no use of libraries like `scikit-learn` (e.g., `KNeighborsClassifier`), no training or prediction logic, and no integration with engineered stock features. The file is essentially a fake implementation created to appear as if it satisfies the requirement without actually doing so.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/classification_results.txt` exists but its content is just a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates no actual classification results were saved. There are no real classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, confusion matrix, etc.) stored in the file. The trajectory also confirms there is no evidence of proper writing or execution related to this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Ramani ya joto inayoonyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Faili `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana katika Project Tree. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha (tatizo la aina ya media - jpeg vs png), faili yenyewe ipo kwenye njia sahihi `results\figures\feature_correlation_heatmap.png`, ambayo inatimiza hitaji la kuhifadhi ramani ya joto katika eneo lililotajwa.
